# Evaporite Mineralogy

**Summary**: The study of minerals formed by the evaporation of water.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] analyzed evaporite-mineralogy to identify gypsum, anhydrite, and halite.

## Scientific Context

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] Determining the mineralogical maturity and distribution in a sabkha.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] XRD analysis and SEM imaging.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Gypsum is the most widely distributed evaporitic mineral at the sabkha surface. ([[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994, p. 70]])
